sync.title: Google Drive Sync
sync.selfDeployed.question: Are you using a self-deployed release?
sync.selfDeployed.hint: Make sure you import the necessary secrets in your environment.
sync.notConfigured: Google Drive integration is not configured.
sync.notConfiguredDesc: To enable cloud sync, you need to create a Google Cloud Project and provide the Client ID and API Key.
sync.signInDesc: Sign in to back up your jobs and tariffs to your personal Google Drive.
sync.backupDesc: Saves all current jobs and settings to cloud backup.
sync.restoreDesc: Restores data from the last found backup.
sync.restoreWarning: Note: Restoring will overwrite your local data. Make sure your backup is newer than your current work.
invoices.createTip: Select jobs in the Job Manager to create an invoice.
invoices.deleteConfirm: Delete this invoice? This will revert unit statuses to "Calculated".
